summary: Completed frontend testing for match card layout fixes. All requested features verified working: score alignment, team name truncation, prediction bars equal spacing, mobile swipe functionality, desktop 3-column grid, and star icon positioning.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection closes before established (non-blocking, app works without it)

critical_code_review_comments: Match card layout implementation is correct with grid-cols-[1fr_auto_1fr] for proper score centering
line-clamp-2 properly applied to team names to prevent overflow
PredictionBars using grid grid-cols-3 ensures equal width columns
Mobile swipe uses scroll-snap-type: x mandatory with proper card widths (88vw)
Star icon positioning with -top-2 -right-2 keeps icons outside logo bounds
seed_data_creation: None - used existing live match data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Match card layout fixes verified working. Desktop shows 3-column grid, mobile shows horizontally swipeable cards with scroll-snap. Star icons appear when logged in and are positioned correctly. Prediction bars are equally spaced using CSS grid. Live match data available from Bundesliga, Premier League, Primera Division.

score_alignment.details: Score centered between team names using grid-cols-[1fr_auto_1fr] with min-w-[64px] sm:min-w-[80px] for score column

team_name_truncation.details: Team names have line-clamp-2 class, properly truncated (e.g., 'FRE IB...', 'BOURNEMOUTH' -> 'BOURN EMO...')

prediction_bars_alignment.details: All 3 bars have identical widths (87.1px mobile, 86.9px desktop), 0.0px vertical alignment diff, using grid grid-cols-3

mobile_swipe.details: scroll-snap-type: x mandatory working, scrollLeft changes from 4 to 363 on swipe, card width ~88vw (343px on 390px viewport)

desktop_grid.details: Found 5 containers with lg:grid-cols-3 class, 3 cards visible per row on desktop

star_icon_positioning.details: Star icons have -top-2 -right-2 positioning classes, 38 star icons found when logged in (2 per match card)

homepage_load.details: 19 match cards found, all league sections visible (Bundesliga, Premier League, Primera Division)
